version_description: Https://youtu.be/MEO6gYCFbr0 Complete aligned lyrics and sequence. Version especially for mediocre players.

versions.version_description: Mr. Cross recorded this song using Open D. This version uses standard tuning with chords meant to show the movement of the treble part. The chord names say/show exactly which strings are played without resorting to tabbing the whole song. (If you want to give Open D a try, see the Tab version called "Sailing Acoustic".).
This version contains many sus chords with the root notes.
Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MEO6gYCFbr0 with Strings Intro, Guitar Arpeggios written as chords, the right Bass Notes (often after a slash symbol).
Uses guitar voicings that more closely mimic the piano chords of the actual recording.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This version is for mediocre players like me.

[Intro]
| [ch]D[/ch]       | [ch]F#m[/ch] | [ch]F#m[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] |
| [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]               [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Well, it's not far down to paradise.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
At least it's not for me.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
And if the wind is right you could sail away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]
Find tranquility.[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles.[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Just you wait and see.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Amaj7[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Believe me.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
It's not far to never, Neverland.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
No reason to pretend.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
And if the wind is right, you could find the joy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Of innocence again.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Just you wait and see.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
Believe me.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  Sailing, takes me away,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
to where I've always, heard it could be.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Soon I will be free.[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A/E[/ch]
Fantasy, it gets the best of me.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]
When I'm sailing.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
All caught up in the reverie.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Every word is a symphony.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
Won't you believe me?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  Sailing, takes me away,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
to where I've always, heard it could be.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Soon I will be free.[/tab]

[Interlude]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   | [ch]D#[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] |
| [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  | [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 4]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Well, it's not far back to sanity.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
At least it's not for me.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]
And if the wind is right you could sail away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]
Find serenity.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
  Oh, the canvas can do miracles.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Just you wait and see.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Really, believe me.[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Sailing, takes me away,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
to where I've always, heard it could be.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Soon I will be free.[/tab]
